metadata.description: Kraken Networks plugin suite — railyard, kb, fathom, nautilus, harbor

plugins.name: railyard
plugins.description: Guided creation and management of Railyard platform entities (agents, governors, tools, workflows, credentials, knowledge graph, memories, chat sessions, knowledge bases, integrations, inbound sources, LLM models, ML stack, pipelines, skills, chatbots, budgets, alerts, compliance, dashboards, webhooks) via REST API with iterative build-test-fix verification.

plugins.name: kb
plugins.description: Kraken Knowledge Base lifecycle management — works with railyard, fathom, nautilus, harbor. Create, update, audit, lint, and manage KB articles with automatic staleness detection and KB-first development enforcement.

plugins.name: fathom
plugins.description: Author and operate Fathom CLIPS rule packs — scaffold packs, templates, and rules; validate/test/bench locally; evaluate, hot-reload, and verify artifacts against a running engine.

plugins.name: nautilus
plugins.description: Author and operate Nautilus brokers — scaffold sources, adapters, and rule packs; drive request/sources/caps APIs; verify attestations and tail audit logs.

plugins.name: harbor
plugins.description: Author Harbor graphs, skills, nodes, tools, and Bosun rule packs; run/replay graphs against harbor serve and inspect checkpoints.
